economic_notes: FLFN Ventures Limited Partnership (99.99% owned) and FLFN Ventures Ltd. (100% owned) are government business enterprises accounted for on modified equity basis. Kahkinah Kana Wapateeing Family Wellness Inc. is fully consolidated. Fishing Lake Store Limited Partnership is a related party. BHP Group Limited payments received ($490,000). Dakota Dunes CDC funding received.
notes: Fiscal year ends March 31, 2023. Province is Saskatchewan. The statement includes a large flow-through of deferred revenue (unexpended ISC funds transferred in $8,850,131 as revenue, and $13,208,131 transferred back to deferred revenue), which inflates both revenue and the deferred revenue liability significantly. Restricted cash includes CMHC reserve ($466,028) and trust funds held by federal government ($410,102). Long-term debt includes CMHC mortgages current portion ($264,690) + long-term CMHC ($2,997,065) + other long-term debt ($1,342,715). The 1907 Surrender Trust is excluded from consolidation. Two GBEs (FLFN Ventures LP and FLFN Ventures Ltd.) use fiscal year ending December 31, 2022. Contribution to 1907 Surrender Trust for land acquisition ($77,625 in 2023, $2,682,248 in 2022) treated as other item. Schedule of remuneration not included in extracted text.
